历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for science (physics category) were approximately 1973 → 28515 → 26449 → 22387 → 20184. A significant drop occurred in 2022 (due to low-scoring majors like nursing), followed by a gradual recovery over the past three years, with a cumulative advance of about 8331 places. The 2025 baseline is approximately 20184. The provincial science enrollment plan was 178 in 2021 → 180 in 2022 → 189 in 2023 → 195 in 2024 → 189 in 2025. In 2026, the physics category has 142 students plus 56 in medical sciences, totaling 198, an increase of about 4.8% compared to 2025, which slightly intensifies competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; ranked 8th in the Soft Science main ranking from 2021 to 2024, and 9th in 2025–2026, placing it among the top universities nationwide. In 2026, the reputation evaluation is generally positive, mainly involving the cafeteria ranking first nationally and high enrollment transparency. Douyin popularity ranks 22nd (relatively hot), with short video exposure at an upper-middle level. No obvious record of enrollment gaps, overall application attention is stable and slightly warm. It has A+ disciplines (Mechanical Engineering, Optical Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Public Health and Preventive Medicine, etc.) and A/A- disciplines (Computer Science and Technology, Clinical Medicine, Control Science and Engineering, etc.), totaling 17 disciplines at A- or above, with strong academic strength that attracts high-scoring students.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer science, electronic information/communication, electrical engineering, clinical medicine, and other advantageous majors at HUST continue to be highly recommended. In 2026, the total number of Gaokao takers in the province is 451,000, with an estimated 313,000 in the physics category (based on the recent proportion of about 69.4%), a decrease of about 2.4% from 320,779 in 2025, slightly easing competition (not included in judgment). HUST is located in Wuhan, Hubei, in the central region, which has strong regional appeal for Anhui candidates. The university's enrollment proportion in Anhui is about 4.0% (2025), with a stable enrollment scale.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the upward trend in historical rankings, the slight enrollment expansion in 2026, positive school reputation, strong advantageous disciplines, and a slight decrease in the number of physics category candidates in the province, competition is expected to intensify slightly based on the 2025 baseline of 20184, with a slight backward shift in ranking. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 20811, with a range of 20311–21311.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: The minimum admission rankings for Huazhong University of Science and Technology's medical category in Anhui Province over the past five years are: 2021: 1867 (plan: 29), 2022: 28515 (plan: 26), 2023: 26449 (plan: 38), 2024: 22387 (plan: 56), 2025: 20184 (plan: 56). Since 2022, the ranking has shown a continuous downward trend (easier to enter), with a cumulative decrease of approximately 8331 places, but the decline is narrowing year by year. The 2026 medical enrollment plan is 56, unchanged from 2025, indicating a stable supply-demand relationship.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Huazhong University of Science and Technology is a national key university directly under the Ministry of Education, a key construction university of the national '985 Project' and '211 Project', and is included in the 'Double First-Class' construction university list. Its Tongji Medical College is one of the top medical schools in China, with clinical medicine selected as a national 'Double First-Class' construction discipline, enjoying a very high reputation in the medical field and having a sustained attraction for high-quality students from Anhui Province.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Huazhong University of Science and Technology's Tongji Medical College is highly recognized among medical candidates in Anhui Province, with core majors such as Clinical Medicine (Eight-Year Program) and Clinical Medicine (Outstanding Physician Qiming Experimental Class) being highly competitive. The medical enrollment scale in Anhui Province has stabilized at 56 since 2024, providing candidates with relatively stable application opportunities. The overall popularity of medical majors remains high, but the continuous downward trend in rankings in recent years also reflects a supply-demand rebalancing after the expansion of enrollment.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the continuous downward trend in historical rankings and the unchanged enrollment plan for 2026, it is predicted that the minimum admission ranking for Huazhong University of Science and Technology's medical category in 2026 will be approximately 19884, slightly lower than in 2025 (easier to enter), with a fluctuation range expected between 19586 and 20182.
